title: Digital Transformation- IR4
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable digital skills workshop for improving productivity with digital transformation- IR4.
whyThisMatters: Digital Transformation- IR4 helps office teams use digital transformation- IR4 with more structure, accuracy, and confidence. Participants practise 01\] Overview of 4th Industrial Revolution, Typical Application (6 Cases), and Physical Principles - How Do Sensors Work?\ so digital tools become easier to apply to reports, data, communication, and everyday work output.
builtFor: Office teams using digital tools in daily work
Managers who want stronger productivity and reporting habits
Employees who need practical confidence with workplace technology
walkAwayWith: Use the relevant tools or concepts with clearer purpose and structure.
Improve accuracy, productivity, and confidence in everyday tasks.
Apply practical workflows to workplace documents, data, or communication.
Build reusable habits that support better digital work.

modules.title: Physical Principles - How Do Sensors Work?\

methodologyCaption: Most of the session is hands-on: participants practise tasks, compare outputs, and refine workflows for their own roles.
